name: operator can filter the continuous learning evidence section by a date range argument
command: mkdir -p compliance && printf '{"event":"pr-corpus-learn","pattern_id":"p-old","at":"2026-04-01T00:00:00Z"}\n{"event":"pr-corpus-learn","pattern_id":"p-new","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"}\n' > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --since 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'p-new' out.txt && ! grep -q 'p-old' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
